description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups designed for comfort and noise isolation. The headband is wide and appears to be covered in a matte black material, with visible branding text on the top. The ear cups are oval-shaped and thickly padded, likely using synthetic leather or foam for comfort during extended use. The headphones feature visible hinges and adjustment sliders, allowing the user to customize the fit. The exterior of the ear cups has a subtle circular pattern, suggesting a modern, stylish design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of plastic and metal components for durability and flexibility.
description: A pair of over-ear, padded black headphones with a wide headband and large cushioned ear cups, featuring visible branding and adjustable hinges.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full headband curve, both ear cups, and the branding on the headband.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the hinge mechanism and the depth of the ear cup padding.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the headband's branding and the oval shape of the ear cups.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the adjustment sliders and the circular pattern on the ear cup exterior.
